title: Common Presentation Properties
text: Common Presentation Properties Alignment or Text Position (align) Background Image (BackImage) Background Color (BackColor) Foreground Color (ForeColor) Horizontal Alignment (Halign) Horizontal Scaling ( Hscale) Image Size (ImgSize) Number of Columns (Columns) Number of Rows ( rows) Preserve Aspect Ratio ( PreserveAspect) Title Vertical Alignment ( Valign) Vertical Scaling ( Vscale) Was this topic helpful?
